items.title: AI Stocks Pressured In Early 2026 Test. Lumentum, Ciena Jump, Nvidia Edges Down
items.description: Nvidia stock rose Tuesday amid a sell-off in many data center plays as investors mulled capital spending on artificial intelligence.

items.title: AWS PartnerCast will showcase how Treehouse Software is helping a customer replicate mainframe data into targets on AWS without disrupting critical work on the legacy system
items.description: Treehouse Software, Inc. is pleased to announce that Amazon Web Services (AWS) will be hosting a PartnerCast entitled, "Replicate Mainframe Data at Scale through Amazon MSK and AWS Lambda with Treehouse TDT" on January 28, 2026. This session will show how a large automobile manufacturer is using Treehouse Dataflow Toolkit (TDT) for auto-scalable and event-driven bulk and CDC data transfers from their mainframe databases to Snowflake on AWS. Attendees will learn how TDT is much more than a mere "

items.title: Stock market today: Dow crosses 49,000, S&P 500 jumps to new high in record-setting start to year
items.description: US stocks rose on Tuesday as investors eyed fresh records for the Dow and S&P 500.

items.title: TPG, Bread Financial, Donnelley Financial Solutions, and Capital One Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
items.description: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after investors shrugged off geopolitical tensions in Venezuela to push the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average to new all-time highs.

items.title: Bitcoin miners face steep costs as they pivot to AI and HPC, HIVE chair says
items.description: As Bitcoin miners increasingly pivot toward artificial intelligence and high-performance computing (HPC), many assume their biggest competition will come from cloud giants such as Amazon, Google or Microsoft. According to Frank Holmes, executive chairman of HIVE Digital Technologies, the reality is ...
